AI at Work — Daily Digest
Generated 2026-03-20 12:51 UTC
==================================================

1. Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19182v1
   → 1. Box Maze offers a new architecture to ensure reliable reasoning in LLMs, crucial for professionals relying on AI.

2. Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19220v1
   → 2. Nemotron-Cascade 2 provides compact yet powerful models for improved reasoning and agentic capabilities in AI applications.

3. langchain-ai/open-swe
   https://github.com/langchain-ai/open-swe
   → 3. langchain-ai/open-swe introduces an open-source asynchronous coding agent enhancing developer workflows.

4. obra/superpowers
   https://github.com/obra/superpowers
   → 4. obra/superpowers offers a framework for developing software with agentic skills, streamlining development processes.

5. AI coding is gambling
   https://notes.visaint.space/ai-coding-is-gambling/
   → 5. AI coding can introduce risks and inefficiencies; Claude Code Commands aim to mitigate these by improving workflows.

6. Claude Code Commands That Improve Developer Workflows
   https://www.toolmesh.ai/news/unlocking-claude-code-hidden-features-advanced-commands
   → 6. Claude Code Commands improve developer work efficiency through streamlined AI integration in code reviews.

7. Versioned repo files as shared memory for multi-agent coding workflows
   https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/github-copilot/how-squad-runs-coordinated-ai-agents-inside-your-repository/
   → 7. Versioned repo files as shared memory facilitate better coordination among multiple agents in multi-agent coding environments.

8. vas3k/TaxHacker
   https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
   → 8. vas3k/TaxHacker provides a self-hosted solution for analyzing and categorizing financial documents using LLMs, aiding accountants.

9. 2% of ICML papers desk rejected because the authors used LLM in their reviews
   https://blog.icml.cc/2026/03/18/on-violations-of-llm-review-policies/
   → 9. The incident at ICML highlights the importance of proper usage of AI tools like LLMs to avoid biases or errors in academic evaluations.

10. jarrodwatts/claude-hud
   https://github.com/jarrodwatts/claude-hud
   → 10. jarrodwatts/claude-hud enhances Claude Code by visualizing tool usage and progress, improving transparency and collaboration in coding projects.
